name.description: Name of the benchmark run, used for labeling results

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 formatted timestamp of when the benchmark was run

measurements.description: List of languages with their benchmark results grouped by year/day/part/run

language.description: Programming language that produced the measurements

group_key.description: Optional key describing a logical grouping of runs (e.g. 'sample' vs 'full').

duration.description: Measured duration of the benchmark, in Go time.Duration syntax.

iterations.description: Number of iterations the benchmark performed (optional).

day.description: Day of the benchmark, used for grouping results

year.description: Year of the benchmark, used for grouping results

part.description: Part of the benchmark, used for grouping results

description.description: Optional description of the benchmark result
